flagged.detail: Tautological cloze: the deletion 'the midbrain' just restates the prompt ('The midbrain becomes [the midbrain]'), conveying no study value, and the back is placeholder profanity ('fuck you') rather than real content.
flagged.evidence: Q: 'The midbrain becomes [...]' -> A: 'The midbrain becomes the midbrain fuck you'

notes: Batch 17 is a clean, uniform set of 257 single/dual cloze cards (AACloze) from the MrPankow P/S Deck (units 6B, 6C, 7A). Cloze {{cN::...}} braces are well-formed and balanced (including the ::hint syntax that renders as [Brain region], [Theory], etc.), HTML tags (font/div/i/b/u/img/br) are balanced even inside the multi-line cloze 'theory of emotion' cards, and no LaTeX/MathJax delimiters are used (figures live in the Extra field as images). Q/A correspondence is correct throughout with no empty answers, no answer==question, no unrendered template artifacts, and no image-only/image-occlusion cards. The only flagged card is one tautological 'midbrain becomes the midbrain' note whose back is throwaway profanity; a handful of unrelated spelling typos (e.g., 'cerebullum', 'temportal', 'Percieved', 'disappeasra') and crude/informal Extra notes exist but do not break studying, so they were not flagged.
